name: Simulated blood / serum medium
description: Blood-serum metabolite environment, HMDB-derived concentrations converted to FBA uptake bounds.

provenance.citation: Ardalani et al. PLOS Pathogens (2025); HMDB serum metabolome (S5 Table).

oxygen_note: blood/serum O2 is limited and venous/arterial-dependent; not an aerobic broth
